name: SnakeByte
description: SnakeByte is a retro-inspired snake game with simple controls, classic arcade pacing, score chasing, achievements, and visuals inspired by early home computer games.

name: BrickByte
description: BrickByte is a retro brick-breaking arcade game inspired by classic bat-and-ball gameplay with power-ups, achievements, and high-score chasing.

name: SpaceByte
description: SpaceByte is a retro space shooter inspired by classic alien invasion arcade games with score chasing and wave-based gameplay.
